---
title: " "
output:
    bookdown::pdf_book:
        toc: false    # printed manually later
        toc_depth: 3
        citation_package: natbib
        latex_engine: xelatex
        extra_dependencies: ["float", "subfiles", "pdfpages"]
        keep_tex: true
# lot: true    # list of tables, printed manually later
# lof: true    # list of figures, printed manually later
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
  rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
  output_dir = "Manuscript", output_format = "all") })
documentclass: report
#bibliography: FALSE
mainfont: Times New Roman
fontsize: 12pt
linestretch: 1.5    # linespacing
classoption: [a4paper]
geometry: [top=2cm, bottom=2cm, right=2cm, left=2.5cm]
# subparagraph: yes    # don't know what this does
indent: true
biblio-style: apalike
colorlinks: true
linkcolor: black
citecolor: blue
# toccolor: red
# thanks: I thank...
# abstract: Very long abstract.
editor_options: 
    chunk_output_type: console    # this is just a personal preference
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{titlesec}
  - \titleformat{\chapter}{\normalfont\LARGE\bfseries}{\thechapter}{1em}{}
  - \titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{3.5ex plus 1ex minus .2ex}{2.3ex plus .2ex}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amsfonts}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
---


\begin{align*}
  X &= \begin{bmatrix} 
    1 & \cdots & 0\\
    \vdots & \ddots & \vdots\\
    0 & \cdots & 1 
  \end{bmatrix}.
\end{align*}
